title: Employer interview slot notify
oneLiner: Voice-guided tour for use case: Employer interview slot notify

steps.label: Landing page ready
steps.observe: Home page is open. Auto voice tour begins — no blue-tag clicks needed.

steps.label: Employer logs in
steps.observe: Campus partnership must be approved for target college.

steps.label: Open Interview Scheduling
steps.observe: Link slot to job, internship, or drive opening.

steps.label: Student opens My Interviews
steps.observe: Scheduled slot with date, mode, venue.

steps.label: Navigate to My Interviews
steps.observe: Alert and interview row match employer notification.

steps.label: Email logs — employer_interview_slot
steps.observe: Filter by context or student login email.

steps.label: Open Email delivery logs
steps.observe: Sent rows with recipient audit fields.
